loop1.title: Tap Position Optimization
loop1.note: Showing OLTC tap position snapshot — tap position, optimal position, and tap count are not measured by this asset's electrical meter.

loop1.title: Voltage Regulation Timeline
loop1.note: Showing voltage regulation timeline — tap position is not measured by this asset, so load factor is used as a proxy for tap activity (partial).

loop1.title: Recent Tap Changes
loop1.note: Showing tap change sequence (time, from, to) — these columns are not in the standard electrical meter schema; the card relies on the asset's specific change-log endpoint to populate the table rows.

loop1.title: Tap Activity & Wear
loop1.note: Showing active energy and load factor as proxies for tap operations — this transformer meter does not log a dedicated tap counter column.
